reviews.comment:
Es una de las mejores estaciones de Belgrano, ideal socios ACA, ya que es un ACA, valga la redundancia. Tiene área de servicios, lavadero, Bar, y una vez me lavaron el motor a seco.  Buen lugar, lo recomiendo.

(Translated by Google)
It's one of the best gas stations in Belgrano, ideal for ACA members, since it is an ACA station, obviously. It has a service area, a car wash, a bar, and they even gave me a dry cleaning once. Good place, I recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTeXZxemdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy limpio ,pero uno d los guardias no me dé ji o usar el baño d mujeres ,la chica d limpieza estaba limpiando el d hombres y yo le expliqué qeee q tenia una emergencia,y q venía d un viaje largo,heran as aproximadamente 8 am

(Translated by Google)
Very clean, but one of the guards wouldn't let me use the women's restroom. The cleaning lady was cleaning the men's restroom, and I explained that I had an emergency and that I had just come from a long trip. It was approximately 8 am.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNTbGUyQmN3EAE
